message:
feat(util): add JS fallbacks for promisify and types

Added JavaScript implementations of util.promisify and util.types as
fallbacks in case native implementations are not available. These only
activate when the native code hasn't defined them, providing a safety
net for alternative build configurations.

- promisify: wraps callback-style functions into Promise-returning ones
- types: provides type checking functions (isArray, isDate, etc.)
